definition_cn: 利用无线电波传送物体影像的装置。由发射台把实物的影像变成电能信号传播出去,电视机把收到的信号再变成影像映在荧光屏上。电视除了用在文化娱乐和教育方面外,也广泛地用在其他技术和军事方面。
definition_en: television; TV; facility for transmitting visual images via radio wave. The launch pad transmits images in electric signals, which are converted back into images on the screen of a television set. Television is used extensively in military and other technologies, as well as for cultural, entertainment and educational purposes.

definition_cn: 东边和西边。
definition_en: east and west

definition_cn: 今天的下一天。
definition_en: tomorrow

definition_cn: 彼此有交情的人。
definition_en: friend

definition_cn: 老师。
definition_en: teacher

definition_cn: 对知识分子的称呼。
definition_en: (of intellectuals) Mister (Mr.); gentleman; sir

definition_cn: 〈方dial.〉医生。
definition_en: doctor

definition_cn: 中国古代历法把二十八宿按日、月、火、水、木、金、土的次序排列,七日一周,周而复始,称为‘七曜’;西洋历法中也有‘七日为一周’的说法,跟中国的‘七曜’暗合。后来根据国际习惯,把这样连续排列的七天作为工作学习等作息日期的计算单位,叫做星期。
definition_en: week. In the ancient Chinese calendar, the 28 constellations are arranged in the order of the sun(日rì), the moon(月yuè), fire or the Mars(火huǒ), water or the Mercury(水shuǐ), wood or the Jupiter(木mù), metal or the Venus(金jīn) and earth or the Saturn(土tǔ) in a seven-day cycle dubbed ‘seven stars’, which coincides with the ‘seven-day week’ in the Western calendar. Thus the seven-day period becomes a measurement unit for work, study and rest according to the international practice, and it is called ‘week’.

definition_cn: 怎样。
definition_en: how about; what about

definition_cn: 同父母(或只同父、只同母)而年纪比自己小的男子。
definition_en: younger brother; younger half-brother

definition_cn: 同父母(或只同父、只同母)而年纪比自己大的男子。
definition_en: elder brother (having the same parents or parent)

definition_cn: 同父母(或只同父、只同母)而年纪比自己大的女子。
definition_en: elder sister; older girl or woman having the same parents or parent

definition_cn: 同父母(或只同父、只同母)而年纪比自己小的女子。
definition_en: younger sister of the same parent(s)

definition_cn: 价钱低。
definition_en: cheap; at a bargain price

definition_cn: 物质存在的一种客观形式,由过去、现在、将来构成的连绵不断的系统。是物质的运动、变化的持续性、顺序性的表现。
definition_en: time; objective form in which matter exists, a continuous system composed of the past, present and future, which shows the nature of continuity and sequence in the movements and changes of matter

definition_cn: 物体的位置不断变化的现象。通常指一个物体和其他物体之间相对位置的变化,说某物体运动常是对另一物体而言。
definition_en: motion; movement; continuous change of location of an object, usu. referring to the change of location of a certain object in relation to others

definition_cn: 指宇宙间所发生的一切变化和过程,从简单的位置变动到复杂的人类思维,都是物质运动的表现。
definition_en: motion; movement; all changes and processes in the universe, from simple change in location to complex human thought processes

definition_cn: 〈方dial.〉母亲的姐妹。
definition_en: aunt; mother's sister

definition_cn: 指锻造或冶炼。
definition_en: forge; smelt; temper

definition_cn: 翻检查考(书籍、文件等)。
definition_en: look over and study (books, documents, etc.)

definition_cn: 旁边有房屋的比较宽阔的道路。
definition_en: street

definition_cn: 银河系的恒星之一，是一炽热的气体球，体积是地球的130万倍，质量是地球的33.34万倍，表面温度约6000℃，内部温度约1500万℃，内部经常不断地进行原子核反应而产生大量的热能。太阳是太阳系的中心天体，距地球约1.5亿公里。地球和其他行星都围绕着它旋转并且从它得到光和热。
definition_en: sun; a fixed star in the Galaxy, a fiery gaseous ball 1.3 million times the size of the earth, with a mass 333,400 times that of the earth, a surface temperature of approximately 6,000℃ and an interior temperature of about 15 million ℃, releasing mammoth amounts of heat through constant nuclear reaction within it. The earth, approximately 150 million km. from the sun, revolves along with other planets around the sun, the centre of the solar system, and receives light and heat from it.

definition_cn: 人类在社会历史发展过程中所创造的物质财富和精神财富的总和,特指精神财富,如文学、艺术、教育、科学等。
definition_en: civilization; culture; sum total of the material wealth and cultural wealth created by man in the course of the historical development of society, cultural wealth in particular, such as literature, arts, education, and science, etc.

definition_cn: 考古学用语,指同一个历史时期的不依分布地点为转移的遗迹、遗物的综合体。同样的工具、用具,同样的制造技术等,是同一种文化的特征,如仰韶文化、龙山文化。
definition_en: (of archaeology) comprehensive body of sites and ruins left behind, which are independent of their locations, in a given historical period. Identical tools, implements and manufacturing skills, etc. are characteristics of the same culture, as the Yangshao culture and the Longshan culture.

definition_cn: 娱乐活动,如捉迷藏、猜灯谜等。某些非正式比赛项目的体育活动如康乐球等也叫游戏。
definition_en: recreation; game; entertainment activities, such as hide-and-seek and guessing riddles. Some non-competition sports, such as caroms, are also called 游戏yóuxì.

definition_cn: 植物的果实等完全长成,泛指生物体发育到完备的阶段。
definition_en: (of fruit) be ripe; (in a broad sense) (of creatures) mature; grow to maturity

definition_cn: 腹的通称。
definition_en: belly; abdomen

definition_cn: 客观事物的个别特性在人脑中引起的反应,如苹果作用于我们的感官时,通过视觉可以感到它的颜色,通过味觉可以感到它的味道。感觉是最简单的心理过程,是形成各种复杂心理过程的基础。
definition_en: sense; perception; sensation; mental process precipitated by physical stimulation, based on which various complex psychological processes ensue, e.g. when an apple acts on the sense organs, its colour can be seen and its fragrance smelt

definition_cn: 进行生产劳动时所使用的器具,如锯、刨、犁、锄。
definition_en: tool, instrument, implements of production, e.g. saw, digger, plough, hoe, etc.

definition_cn: 门闩或功能类似门闩的东西。
definition_en: door bolt; door bar

definition_cn: 广播电台、电视台发射无线电波,播送节目。有线电播送节目也叫广播。
definition_en: (of a radio or television station) transmit programmes by sending out radio waves; wired radio programmes; broadcast; be on the air

definition_cn: 建筑物的根脚。
definition_en: foundation of a building

definition_cn: 各种运输和邮电事业的总称。
definition_en: general term for transportation, postal and telecommunications services

definition_cn: 抗日战争和解放战争时期指通信和联络工作。
definition_en: (in the War of Resistance against Japan and the War of Liberation) communication; liaison

definition_cn: 指交通员。
definition_en: liaison man; underground messenger

definition_cn: 培养新生一代准备从事社会生活的整个过程,主要是指学校对儿童、少年、青年进行培养的过程。
definition_en: education; schooling; education of the younger generation for future participation in social life, primarily referring to instruction given to children, teenagers and youths in educational institutions

definition_cn: 经济学上指社会物质生产和再生产的活动。
definition_en: economy; term in economics denoting the activities of material production and reproduction of a society

definition_cn: 反映自然、社会、思维等的客观规律的分科的知识体系。
definition_en: science; branch of knowledge reflecting systematized observation of nature, society, or ways of thinking

definition_cn: 构成地球周围大气的气体。无色,无味,主要成分是氮气和氧气,还有极少量的氡、氦、氖、氩、氪、氙等惰性气体和水蒸气、二氧化碳等。
definition_en: air; mixture of invisible, colourless, and odourless gases (e.g. nitrogen, oxygen, vapour, carbon dioxide, plus a small quantity of inert gases including radon, helium, neon, argon, krypton, and xenon) that surrounds the earth

definition_cn: 虎的通称。
definition_en: general term for 虎hǔ

definition_cn: 指有大量贪污、盗窃或偷漏税行为的人。
definition_en: person who has committed embezzlement, theft or tax evasion on a large scale

definition_cn: 思维的基本形式之一,就是肯定或否定某种事物的存在,或指明它是否具有某种属性的思维过程。在形式逻辑上用一个命题表达出来。
definition_en: judge; basic form of thinking, i.e., the process of thinking to confirm or negate the existence of sth. or determine if it possesses certain property, expressed as a proposition in formal logic

definition_cn: 身体表面包在肌肉外部的组织,人和高等动物的皮肤由表皮、真皮和皮下组织三层组成,有保护身体、调节体温、排泄废物等作用。
definition_en: skin; tissue covering the muscles of a human or higher animal body, composed of epidermis, dermis, and subcutaneous tissue, the function of which is to protect the body, adjust the body temperature, and sweat out impurities

definition_cn: (飞机、火箭等)开始飞行。
definition_en: (of aircraft; rocket; etc.) take off

definition_cn: 一定地区里经过多年观察所得到的概括性的气象情况。它与气流、纬度、海拔高度、地形等有关。
definition_en: climate; meteorological conditions of a particular region, having to do with air currents, latitude, altitude and topography, defined on the basis of many years of careful observation

definition_cn: 工、商、戏剧等行业中传授技艺的人。
definition_en: master who gives instructions in any industrial or business trade, or opera, etc.

definition_cn: 表示数目的文字。汉字的数字有小写大写两种,‘一二三四五六七八九十’等是小写,‘壹贰叁肆伍陆柒捌玖拾’等是大写。
definition_en: written characters that denote amounts. Numbers in Chinese characters are classified as ordinary and capital forms, i.e. 一二三四五六七八九十 are ordinary forms of 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9 and 10, and 壹贰叁肆伍陆柒捌玖拾 are the capital forms.

definition_cn: 表示数目的符号,如阿拉伯数字、苏州码子。
definition_en: numeral; figure; digit; symbols that denote numbers, e.g. Arabic numerals, Suzhou numerals, etc.

definition_cn: 运动物体在某一个方向上单位时间内所通过的距离。
definition_en: speed; velocity; rate of time at which sth. moves or operates

definition_cn: 篇幅不很长的单篇作品。
definition_en: a piece of short writing; essay; article

definition_cn: 泛指著作。
definition_en: (in a broad sense) literary works; writings

definition_cn: 关于人或事物情况的报道。
definition_en: news; information; report or coverage of a person or an event

definition_cn: 振奋;激动。
definition_en: be excited

definition_cn: 大脑皮层的两种基本神经活动过程之一,是在外部或内部刺激之下产生的。兴奋引起或增强皮层和相应器官机能的活动状态,如肌肉的收缩、腺体的分泌等。
definition_en: excitation; one of two basic processes of activity of the cerebral cortex resulting from external or internal stimulation. Excitation causes or increases the activity of the functions of the cortex and the corresponding organs, as contraction of the muscles and secretion of glands.

definition_cn: 物体所承受的与表面垂直的作用力。
definition_en: pressure; force applied uniformly over a surface

definition_cn: 用形象来反映现实但比现实有典型性的社会意识形态,包括文学、绘画、雕塑、建筑、音乐、舞蹈、戏剧、电影、曲艺等。
definition_en: art; social ideology reflecting reality through images and being more typical than reality, including literature, painting, sculpture, architecture, music, dancing, drama, movie, etc.

definition_cn: 语言的结构方式,包括词的构成和变化、词组和句子的组织。
definition_en: grammar; branch of the study of language that deals with forms and structure of words, with their customary arrangement in phrases and sentences

definition_cn: 人类所特有的用来表达意思、交流思想的工具,是一种特殊的社会现象,由语音、词汇和语法构成一定的系统。‘语言’一般包括它的书面形式,但在与‘文字’并举时只指口语。
definition_en: language; tool peculiar to mankind, used for expression and communication of thoughts and feelings, which is a special social phenomenon and has a particular system consisting of speech sounds, vocabulary and grammar. 语言 generally includes the written form, but only refers to the spoken language when used together with 文字(written language).

definition_cn: 人们在改造世界的实践中所获得的认识和经验的总和。
definition_en: knowledge; facts and experiences acquired by people in their practice to transform the objective world

definition_cn: 个人在社会中所从事的作为主要生活来源的工作。
definition_en: occupation; profession; vocation; a person's regular work or profession; job or principal activity as the means of livelihood

definition_cn: 量度物体惯性大小的物理量。数值上等于物体所受外力和它获得的加速度的比值。有时也指物体中所含物质的量。质量是常量,不因高度或纬度变化而改变。
definition_en: physical capacity measuring a body's inertia, equal to the ratio of an outside force upon a body to changes in the speed; also the quantity of matter a body contains. The mass of a body is a constant, and not changed by altitude or latitude.

definition_cn: 阻力点的旧称。
definition_en: old name for 阻力点 zǔlìdiǎn

definition_cn: 机体中构成器官的单位,是由许多形态和功能相同的细胞按一定的方式结合而成的。人和高等动物体内有上皮组织、结缔组织、肌肉组织和神经组织。
definition_en: tissue; substance of an organic body or organ, consisting of cells and intercellular material in the same form and with the same function, as epithelial tissue, connective tissue, muscle tissue and nerve tissue in humans and other higher animals

definition_cn: 集中分散的社会资金,补偿因自然灾害、意外事故或人身伤亡而造成的损失的方法。参加保险的人或单位,向保险机构按期缴纳一定数量的费用,保险机构对在保险责任范围内所受的损失负赔偿责任。
definition_en: insurance; system for pooling scattered social resources to compensate people for losses caused by natural disasters, accidents, personal injuries or death. The insured individual or organization pays a regular premium, and the insurance company is responsible for indemnifying them for losses within the specified contingencies.

definition_cn: 舞台上或电影、电视剧里的布景。放在后面,衬托前景。
definition_en: stage setting; backdrop; scenery; setting or scenery on a stage or for a film or TV series, placed at the rear to set off the foreground

definition_cn: 图画、摄影里衬托主体事物的景物。
definition_en: background to a picture or photograph that sets off the main subject

definition_cn: 标点符号。
definition_en: punctuation mark

definition_cn: 一种质地硬而脆的透明物体。一般用石英砂、石灰石、纯碱等混合后,在高温下熔化、成型、冷却后制成。主要成分是二氧化硅、氧化钠和氧化钙。
definition_en: glass; hard and brittle transparent material, usu. made from quartzite, limestone and soda ash, the mixture of which is melted, fused and shaped under high temperatures and then cooled down, its main elements being silica, sodium oxide and calcium oxide

definition_cn: 用仪器或其他办法检验。
definition_en: test; prove by means of instruments or other methods

definition_cn: 翅的通称。
definition_en: popular term for 翅(chì)

definition_cn: 从许多事物中,舍弃个别的、非本质的属性,抽出共同的、本质的属性,叫抽象,是形成概念的必要手段。
definition_en: draw on common nature or essence of a number of things and abandon their individual and non-essential property in order to formulate a concept

definition_cn: (船只)驶出港口。
definition_en: (of a ship) depart from the port

definition_cn: 病原体侵入生物体,使生物体产生病理反应,叫做传染。有明显症状的叫显性传染,无明显症状的叫隐性传染。
definition_en: infect; contagion; pathological reaction of an organic body to the invasion by a pathogen; known as dominant contagion when obvious symptoms occur, and as recessive contagion when no obvious symptoms occur

definition_cn: 现实的物体和现象作用于感觉器官的过程;声、光、热等引起生物体活动或变化的作用。
definition_en: stimulation; stimulus; incitation; incitement; fillip; stimulation of sensory organs by material things and phenomena through which activity is evoked; sound, light, heat, etc., that produces a temporary increase of physiological activity in an organism or in any of its parts

definition_cn: 对待(人)。
definition_en: deal with a person

definition_cn: 计量事物的标准量的名称。如厘米为计算长度的单位,克为计算质量的单位,秒为计算时间的单位等。
definition_en: amount or quantity taken as a standard of measurement, such as ‘centimetre’ as a unit of length, ‘gramme’ as a unit of weight, and ‘second' as a unit of time

definition_cn: 地理学。
definition_en: geography

definition_cn: 军队在编制上不隶属于高一级的单位而直接隶属于更高级的单位的,如不隶属于团而直接隶属于师的营叫独立营。
definition_en: independent; (of a military unit) under direct command of a higher authority than its direct leadership, e.g. an independent battalion that is subordinate to a division instead of a regiment

definition_cn: 有机体受到体内或体外的刺激而引起的相应的活动。
definition_en: reaction; action of an organism in response to interior or exterior stimuli

definition_cn: 化学反应。
definition_en: chemical reaction

definition_cn: 打针或服药所引起的呕吐、发烧、头痛、腹痛等症状。
definition_en: symptom such as vomiting, fever, headache and stomach-ache as a reaction to injection or medication

definition_cn: 钢和铁的合称,有时专指钢。
definition_en: iron and steel; steel

definition_cn: 被压迫阶级用暴力夺取政权,摧毁旧的腐朽的社会制度,建立新的进步的社会制度。革命破坏旧的生产关系,建立新的生产关系,解放生产力,推动社会的发展。
definition_en: revolution — the oppressed classes rise in revolt to seize power, destroy an old decadent social system and build a new advanced society. Revolution can destroy the old relations of production, build new ones, free up productivity, and promote the development of society.

definition_cn: 典故。
definition_en: classical allusion; literary quotation

definition_cn: 人和脊椎动物体内支持身体、保护内脏的坚硬组织,主要成分是碳酸钙和磷酸钙。根据形状的不同,分为长骨、短骨、扁骨等。
definition_en: bone; hard tissue in the body of a human being and vertebrate animals supporting the body and protecting the internal organs, its main composition being calcium carbonate and calcium phosphate; there being long bones, short bones and flat bones

definition_cn: 指个人具有的属于某个国家的身份。
definition_en: nationality; citizenship

definition_cn: 植物体的一部分,花受精后,子房逐渐长大,成为果实。有些果实可供食用。
definition_en: fruit; ripened reproductive body of a plant, developed from the ovary after the fecundation of the flower. Some fruits are edible.

definition_cn: (生活)过分铺张;奢侈。
definition_en: luxurious (living); extravagant

definition_cn: 生物体与外界进行气体交换。人和高等动物用肺呼吸,低等动物靠皮肤呼吸,植物通过表面的组织进行气体交换。
definition_en: breathe; respire. Organisms exchange air with the environment. Human beings and higher animals breathe through lungs, lower animals breathe through the skin, and plants breathe through their surface tissue.

definition_cn: 研究物质的组成、结构、性质和变化规律的科学,是自然科学中的基础学科之一。
definition_en: chemistry; one of the basic natural sciences, which deals with the composition, structure, properties and rules of change of substances

definition_cn: 金的通称。
definition_en: general term for 金1jīn ④

definition_cn: 体现在商品里的社会必要劳动。价值量的大小决定于生产这一商品所需的社会必要劳动时间的多少。不经过人类劳动加工的东西,如空气,即使对人们有使用价值,也不具有价值。
definition_en: value; socially necessary labour embodied in a commodity, whose value is determined by the socially necessary labour and the time consumed in the production of it. A thing that consumes no human labour, such as air, has no value even if it has use value to the humans.

definition_cn: 角的大小。通常用度或弧度来表示。
definition_en: angle; space between two straight lines or planes that intersect, measured in degrees or radians

definition_cn: (船只)驶进港口。
definition_en: (of ships) sail into a port

definition_cn: 泛指各宗教宣扬教义的根本性著作。
definition_en: (in a broad sense) religious scriptures

definition_cn: 人们由实践概括出来的关于自然界和社会的知识的有系统的结论。
definition_en: theory; principle; systematic conclusion about the knowledge of nature and society drawn through practice

definition_cn: 币值小的钱,如角、分。
definition_en: small change; change; money of small denominations, such as jiao and fen

definition_cn: 一个国家行使主权的区域。
definition_en: territory; domain; realm; area in which a state exercises its sovereignty

definition_cn: 工作进度迟缓,落在原定计划的后面。
definition_en: (of work) proceed slowly and fall behind schedule

definition_cn: 一种用发酵的面粉蒸成的食品,一般上圆而下平,没有馅儿。
definition_en: steamed bread made from raised dough with no filling usu. in a rounded cone shape

definition_cn: 指器物发生的损伤或故障
definition_en: mishap; breakdown; blunder

definition_cn: 辩证法上指客观事物和人类思维内部各个对立面之间的互相依赖而又互相排斥的关系。
definition_en: (in dialectics) contradiction; interdependent yet conflicting relationship between the opposites in any objective thing or thought

definition_cn: 形式逻辑中指两个概念互相排斥或两个判断不能同时是真也不能同时是假的关系。
definition_en: (in formal logic) contradiction between two opposing concepts, or the relationship between two propositions that cannot both be true or false at the same time

definition_cn: 指人民有参与国事或对国事有自由发表意见的权利。
definition_en: democracy; democratic rights; right of the people to participate in the state affairs and to air their views freely on the state affairs

definition_cn: 古书上指金星。
definition_en: Venus as described in ancient books

definition_cn: 因体力或脑力消耗过多而需要休息。
definition_en: tired; in need of rest after being drained of physical strength and energy

definition_cn: 经过人工选择和培育、具有一定经济价值和共同遗传特点的一群生物体(通常指栽培植物、牲畜、家禽等)。
definition_en: breed; strain; group of organisms that are artificially selected and cultivated, have common inherited characteristics and are of commercial value, i.e. cultivated plants, livestock, and poultry

definition_cn: 指人们在社会、政治、经济、法律等方面享有相等待遇。
definition_en: (of people) enjoy equality in social status, politics, economy, law, etc.

definition_cn: 债务人不能偿还债务时,法院根据本人或债权人的申请,做出裁定,把债务人的财产变价依法归还各债主,其不足之数不再偿付。
definition_en: bankruptcy; judging of a court on the application of a person or his creditors when he is not able to repay his debt, according to which the debtor's properties are sold at current prices to repay the creditors and the rest of debt will not be repaid

definition_cn: 变革(社会制度、风俗习惯等)。
definition_en: (of social systems, custom, etc.) change completely or violently

definition_cn: 物质剧烈氧化而发光、发热。可燃物质和空气中的氧剧烈化合是最常见的燃烧现象。
definition_en: burn; cause to undergo combustion, the most common form of burning being the drastic chemical combination of a combustible matter with oxygen in the air

definition_cn: 人的离合、境遇、存亡等情况。
definition_en: occurrences in a person's life, such as partings and reunions, lot, subsistence and death, etc.

definition_cn: 辨别滋味、帮助咀嚼和发音的器官,在口腔底部,根部固定在口腔底上。
definition_en: tongue; organ attached to the floor of the mouth, used in the ingestion of food, the perception of taste, and, in humans, the articulation of speech sounds

definition_cn: 把中枢神经系统的兴奋传递给各个器官,或把各个器官的兴奋传递给中枢神经系统的组织,是由许多神经纤维构成的。
definition_en: nerve; tissues that transmit the excitation of the central nervous system to the organs or the excitation of the organs to the central nervous system, and consist of many nervous fibres

definition_cn: 实行(自己的主张);履行(自己的诺言)。
definition_en: put (one's view) into practice; carry out (one's promise); implement

definition_cn: 为了检验某种科学理论或假设而进行某种操作或从事某种活动。
definition_en: experiment; test; engage in an operation or activity to test a scientific theory or hypothesis

definition_cn: 客观存在反映在人的意识中经过思维活动而产生的结果。思想的内容为社会制度的性质和人们的物质生活条件所决定,在阶级社会中,思想具有明显的阶级性。
definition_en: thought; thinking; ideology; sequence of thought within objective existence as reflected in human consciousness. One's ideology being determined by the nature of the social system in which one lives and the conditions of his material life. For example, in a class society, a person's ideology is characterized by the social class he or she belongs to.

definition_cn: 用砖、石、混凝土等筑成的一级一级供人上下的建筑物,多在大门前或坡道上
definition_en: staircase; stairway built of bricks, masonry, or concrete at the front gate of a building or on a ramp

definition_cn: 〈旧时old〉通称官吏的妻子。
definition_en: Madam; term of address for the wife of an official

definition_cn: 〈旧时old〉仆人等称女主人。
definition_en: (term of address used by the servant for the mistress of a household) madam

definition_cn: 概括诗文或讲演内容的词句。
definition_en: title; subject; topic

definition_cn: 故意激怒敌人,使敌人出来打仗。
definition_en: throw down the gauntlet; challenge; incite the enemy's anger on purpose to engage the enemy in a battle

definition_cn: 鸟、兽、虫、鱼等动物的身体末端突出的部分,主要作用是辅助运动、保持身体平衡等。
definition_en: tail; posterior part of a bird, animal, insect, fish, etc., elongated and extending beyond the trunk or main part of the body, for aiding movement and keeping balance, etc.

definition_cn: 直接用于杀伤敌人有生力量和破坏敌方作战设施的器械、装置,如刀、枪、火炮、导弹等。
definition_en: weapon; arms; instrument or device of any kind used to injure or kill the effective forces of the enemy and destroy the enemy's war establishments, such as sabre, spear, fire gun, missile, etc.

definition_cn: 独立存在于人的意识之外的客观实在。
definition_en: matter; substance; objective being independent of the consciousness of man

definition_cn: 物体把外界的某些物质吸到内部,如海绵吸收水,木炭吸收气体等。
definition_en: absorb; imbibe; draw; suck up; take sth. in through pores or interstices, such as a sponge absorbing water, and charcoal absorbing gases

definition_cn: 特指有机体把组织外部的物质吸到组织内部,如肠黏膜吸收养分,植物的根吸收水和无机盐等。
definition_en: assimilate; metabolize constructively; transform (food) into living tissue by the process of anabolism, such as the intestinal mucous membrane assimilating nutrition, and the root of a plant drawing water and inorganic salt

definition_cn: 物体使某些现象、作用减弱或消失,如弹簧吸收震动,隔音纸吸收声音等。
definition_en: absorb; take in; moderate or offset certain phenomena or the impact of sth., such as a spring absorbing shock and sound-insulating paper taking in sound

definition_cn: 指性质上互相对立,如大与小相对,美与丑相对。
definition_en: opposite to each other, e.g. big is the opposite of small, and beauty the opposite of ugliness; face to face

definition_cn: 食物在人或动物体内,经过物理和化学作用而变为能够溶解于水并可以被机体吸收的养料。
definition_en: digest food in human or animal body; (through physical and chemical functions) turn food into water-soluble nourishment to be absorbed by the body

definition_cn: 机械、电器等工作时,有用功在总功中所占的百分比。
definition_en: (of machinery, electrical appliances, etc.) ratio of useful work to the total work performed

definition_cn: 人的头脑反映客观现实的过程,如感觉、知觉、思维、情绪等。
definition_en: psychology; mentality; processes of reflecting objective reality by the human brains, such as feelings, consciousness, thoughts, emotions, etc.

definition_cn: 弟弟。
definition_en: younger brother

definition_cn: 称呼年纪比自己小的男子(亲切口气)。
definition_en: [familiar form of address for a man younger than oneself] brother

definition_cn: 语言文字或其他信号所表示的内容。
definition_en: meaning; sense; significance

definition_cn: 公民或法人按法律规定应尽的责任,例如服兵役(跟‘权利’相对as opposed to‘right’})。
definition_en: duty; obligation; responsibility undertaken by a citizen or legal person according to law, such as serving in the army

definition_cn: 构成事物本质的成分。
definition_en: factor; elements that constitute the substance of a matter

definition_cn: 有机体从外界吸取需要的物质来维持生长发育等生命活动的作用。
definition_en: nourish; (of organisms) absorb needed substances from the outside to sustain and promote their vital activities for growth

definition_cn: 镜中、水面等反映出来的物体的形象。
definition_en: reflection; image of an object reflected in a mirror or water surface

definition_cn: 接待客人的人(跟‘客人’相对as opposed to‘guest’})。
definition_en: host; one that receives guests

definition_cn: 〈旧时old〉聘用家庭教师、账房等的人;雇用仆人的人。
definition_en: master; head of a household that hires private tutors, accountants, etc.; one who employs servants

definition_cn: 哲学上把人认识了事物发展的规律性,自觉地运用到实践中去,叫做自由。
definition_en: (philos.) freedom; consciously apply the law of the development of things one knows in practice

definition_cn: 把分析过的对象或现象的各个部分、各属性联合成一个统一的整体(跟‘分析’相对as opposed to‘analyse’})。
definition_en: synthesize; form a whole by bringing together the separate parts and attributes of the analysed objects or phenomena

definition_cn: 中国国务院领导人的名称。
definition_en: premier, title of the leader of the State Council of China

definition_cn: 某些国家政府首脑的名称。
definition_en: prime minister, title of the head of government in some countries

definition_cn: 某些政党领导人的名称。
definition_en: title of the leader of some political parties

definition_cn: 一个民族或家族的上代,特指年代比较久远的。
definition_en: ancestry; ancestors; forebears; forefathers

definition_cn: 把守关口。
definition_en: guard a pass

definition_cn: 中国古代政治哲学中指凭借武力、刑法、权势等进行统治的政策。
definition_en: in ancient times, political philosophy of rule by military force, penal laws and raw power

definition_cn: 包衣服等东西的布。
definition_en: cloth-wrapper

definition_cn: 用布包起来的包儿。
definition_en: bundle wrapped in a cloth

definition_cn: 正面进攻的同时,向敌人的翼侧和后方进攻。
definition_en: launch frontal attack and assault the enemy's flanks and rear at the same time

definition_cn: 在一定温度和压力下,溶液所含溶质的量达到最大限度,不能再溶解。
definition_en: saturation; stage at which no more of a substance can be absorbed into a solution

definition_cn: 把用坏作废的物件报告销账。
definition_en: report damaged or rejected articles so they can be struck off the list

definition_cn: 通过外部冲突的形式而发生重大变化,例如用革命的手段来推翻旧政权,建立新政权。
definition_en: break out; change greatly through external conflicts, e.g. use revolutionary measures to overthrow an old political power and establish a new one

definition_cn: 使照相底片或感光纸感光。
definition_en: exposure; sensitization of negatives or sensitive paper

definition_cn: 强制的力量;武力。
definition_en: violence, force

definition_cn: 人类和动物不学就会的本领,如初生的婴儿会哭会吃奶,蜂酿蜜等都是本能的表现。
definition_en: instinct; inborn ability of humans and animals, such as a baby's ability to cry and suckle at its mother's breast, and a bee's ability to make honey, which are not based on learning

definition_cn: 物质的重量和4℃时同体积纯水的重量的比值，叫做该物质的比重。
definition_en: specific gravity; ratio of the weight of a given volume of a substance to that of the same volume of pure water at 4℃

definition_cn: 保持实物原样或经过加工整理,供学习、研究时参考用的动物、植物、矿物。
definition_en: sample; specimen; animal, plant or ore kept in its original form as an example for research and study

definition_cn: 法院依照法律,对案件做出的决定,分为判决和裁定两种。
definition_en: adjudication; decision made by the court on a case according to the law, including the verdict and ruling

definition_cn: 根据体育运动的竞赛规则,对运动员竞赛的成绩和竞赛中发生的问题做出评判。
definition_en: referee; pass a judgement on the result of an athletic competition or contest and render a decision when dispute occurs in accordance with the rules of the game

definition_cn: 军队中参与指挥部队行动、制定作战计划的干部。
definition_en: staff officer whose job is to assist a commanding officer in directing the troops and making war plans

definition_cn: 土地、房屋、工厂等财产(多指私有的
definition_en: oft. of private ownership

definition_cn: 戏剧、电影、电视剧中由布景、音乐和登场人物组合成的景况。
definition_en: scene, composed of setting, music and characters on the stage in a play, film or drama

definition_cn: 叙事性文学作品中,由人物在一定场合相互发生关系而构成的生活情景。
definition_en: scene in narrative literature brought about by the interaction between characters on a certain occasion

definition_cn: 指戏曲演出时伴奏的人员和乐器,分文武两种,管乐和弦乐是文场面,锣鼓是武场面
definition_en: musical accompaniment (musicians and musical instruments) for a theatrical performance, including orchestral accompaniment and percussional accompaniment;

definition_cn: 由潮汐而引起的水流运动。
definition_en: tide; tidal current

definition_cn: 溶液中难溶解的物质沉到溶液底层。
definition_en: precipitate; sediment; (of insoluble substances in solution) form a sediment at the bottom of a solution

definition_cn: 沉到溶液底层的难溶解的物质。
definition_en: sediment; insoluble substances at the bottom of solutions

definition_cn: 停留。
definition_en: sojourn

definition_cn: 获得某种东西所付出的钱。
definition_en: money required in payment for a purchase

definition_cn: 液体遇冷凝结;使物体受冻凝结。
definition_en: congeal; freeze; change or be changed from liquid to solid by cold

definition_cn: 使机械作功的各种作用力,如水力、风力、电力、畜力等。
definition_en: power; motive power; force or energy that puts machinery to work, e.g. hydropower, wind power, electric power, livestock power, etc.

definition_cn: 把国家的武装力量由和平状态转入战时状态,以及把所有的经济部门(工业、农业、运输业等)转入供应战争需要的工作。
definition_en: mobilize; cause the armed forces to become ready for service and turn all economic sectors (i.e. industry, agriculture, transportation, etc.) to the needs of war

definition_cn: 古代应考的人回答皇帝所问关于治国的策略。
definition_en: policies to be employed in running a state (in a candidate's answer to the emperor in the imperial examinations in ancient China)

definition_cn: 一个系统中某一项在性质、作用、位置或数量上跟另一系统中某一项相当。
definition_en: (in quality, function, position, quantity) corresponding; homologous

definition_cn: 子弹、炮弹的底火经撞击后火药爆发。
definition_en: detonate; cause the gunpowder inside a bullet or shell to explode after its primer has been struck

definition_cn: 〈方dial.〉发生火警;失火。
definition_en: catch fire; be on fire

definition_cn: 把放大器的输出电路中的一部分能量送回输入电路中,以增强或减弱输入讯号的效应。增强输入讯号效应的叫正反馈;减弱输入讯号效应的叫负反馈。正反馈常用来产生振荡;负反馈能稳定放大,减少失真,因而广泛应用于放大器中。
definition_en: feedback; process of returning part of the energy of the output circuit of an amplifier to the input circuit to boost the effects of input signals (positive feedback) or to weaken them (negative feedback). Positive feedback is oft. used to produce vibration, while negative feedback has been widely applied in amplifiers for its property of stabilizing amplification and reducing distortion.

definition_cn: 医学上指某些生理的或病理的效应反过来影响引起这种效应的原因。起增强作用的叫正反馈;起减弱作用的叫负反馈。
definition_en: feedback; physiological or pathological effects that conversely affect their causes, either boosting the effects (positive feedback) or weakening them (negative feedback)

definition_cn: 人的思维对客观事物的普遍本质的概括和反映。各门科学都有自己的一些基本范畴,如化合、分解等,是化学的范畴;商品价值、抽象劳动、具体劳动等,是政治经济学的范畴;本质和现象、形式和内容、必然性和偶然性等,是唯物辩证法的基本范畴。
definition_en: category; summarization and reflection of human thoughts on the general nature of objective matters. Each science has its own basic categories. For example, chemical combination and decomposition are categories of chemistry; commodity value, abstract labour and concrete labour are categories of political economy; and nature and phenomenon, form and content, and necessity and contingency are categories of materialist dialectics.

definition_cn: 方向。东、南、西、北为基本方位;东北、东南、西北、西南为中间方位。
definition_en: directions; points of the compass, with east, west, north and south as the cardinal points, and northeast, southeast, northwest and southwest as mid-points

definition_cn: 事物从旧质到新质的转化。由于事物性质的不同,飞跃有时通过爆发的方式来实现,有时通过新质要素的逐渐积累和旧质要素的逐渐消亡来实现。不同形式的飞跃都是质变。
definition_en: leap; sudden transition; qualitative change from old properties to new ones, sometimes realized in an explosive way, and sometimes in a gradual way in which new properties accumulate and old ones wither away. In philosophy a leap, no matter what form it takes, entails a qualitative change.

definition_cn: 液体达到一定温度时急剧转化为气体的现象,这时液体发生汽化,产生气泡。
definition_en: boil; bubble; phenomenon of the rapid transformation of a liquid into gas at a certain temperature, when the liquid is vaporized and bubbles appear

definition_cn: 指人民公社时期社员定期分配工分值。
definition_en: (in the people's communes) periodical distribution of the cash value of workpoints to commune members

definition_cn: 一个整体分成它的各个组成部分,例如物理学上力的分解,数学上因式的分解等。
definition_en: (of a whole) separate into parts; break up; break down, e.g. in physics resolution of force, in mathematics, resolve into factors

definition_cn: 一种物质经过化学反应而生成两种或两种以上其他物质,如碳酸钙加热分解成氧化钙和二氧化碳。
definition_en: decompose; resolve; break up; split; (of a substance) break up into two or more substances through chemical reaction. For example, when heated, calcium carbonate breaks up into calcium oxide and carbon dioxide.

definition_cn: 刮大风而且往往同时有大雨的天气现象。
definition_en: windstorm; storm; tempest

definition_cn: 一种政治制度,君主把土地分给宗室和功臣,让他们在这土地上建国。中国周代开始有这种制度,其后有些朝代也曾仿行。欧洲中世纪君主把土地分给亲信的人,形式跟中国古代封建相似,中国也把它叫做封建。
definition_en: system of holding lands in fief; political system by which a sovereign grants land to royal clansmen and meritorious statesmen as fiefs. In China, the system began in the Zhou Dynasty and was followed by other dynasties. During the Middle Ages, European monarchs granted lands to trusted followers in a form similar to the system of enfeoffment in ancient China, and that is why Chinese historians also call that system 封建.

definition_cn: 承当(责任、工作、费用等)。
definition_en: bear; carry; shoulder (a responsibility, work, expense, etc.)

definition_cn: 随同主要文件一同制定的文件。
definition_en: appendix; annex; side document drawn up at the same time as the primary one

definition_cn: 随同文件发出的有关的文件或物品。
definition_en: other document or object distributed with the main document enclosed

definition_cn: 皮肤上突起的或肌肉上结成的硬块。
definition_en: swelling on the skin; pimple; lump

definition_cn: 不让聚在一起,使断绝往来。
definition_en: keep apart

definition_cn: 物体因共振而发声的现象,如两个频率相同的音叉靠近,其中一个振动发声时,另一个也会发声。
definition_en: resonance; sound produced in an object by sound or vibrations of a similar frequency from another object. For example, when two tuning forks are brought close to each other, and if one of them is vibrating and emitting a sound, the other produces a sound as well.

definition_cn: 长骨的中央部分,两端跟骨骺相连,里面是空腔。
definition_en: diaphysis; shaft of a long bone with a cavity, linked with the epiphysis at both ends;

definition_cn: 互相照应,全面安排。
definition_en: look after each other and make an overall arrangement

definition_cn: 颜色和光泽;光辉
definition_en: colour and lustre; splendour; radiance; brilliance

definition_cn: 用条形的钢材铺成的供火车、电车等行驶的路线。
definition_en: railroad; tram road; road composed of parallel steel rails providing a track for trains, trams, etc.

definition_cn: 天体在宇宙间运行的路线。
definition_en: orbit; path of a celestial body moving round another;

definition_cn: 物体运动的路线,多指有一定规则的,如原子内电子的运动和人造卫星的运行都有一定的轨道。
definition_en: path; orbit; trajectory; route or course along which an object moves, oft. regularly, e.g. movement of an electron within an atom and that of a man-made satellite, both following a certain course

definition_cn: 指人造卫星、宇宙飞船等在地球附近空间或太阳系空间飞行。
definition_en: space flight; astronautic flight; flight of man-made satellite or spacecraft near the earth or within the solar system

definition_cn: 某些低等动物如蚯蚓、蜈蚣等,身体由许多大小差不多的环状结构互相连接组成,这些结构叫做环节,能伸缩。
definition_en: segment; connected extendible and contractible ring-like structures of similar sizes that form the body of some lower animals, such as earthworm and centipede

definition_cn: 报告(任务、使命等执行的情况)。
definition_en: report back on what has been done

definition_cn: 利用力学原理组成的各种装置。杠杆、滑轮、机器以及枪炮等都是机械。
definition_en: mechanism; installation made according to principles of mechanics, such as lever, pulley, machine, and arms

definition_cn: 指工具或武器。
definition_en: tool; utensil; weapon

definition_cn: 尖锐的末梢;顶点。
definition_en: pointed end; acme; peak

definition_cn: 某些与椭圆、双曲线或抛物线有特殊关系的点。如椭圆的两个焦点到椭圆上任意一点的距离的和是一个常数。
definition_en: focal point; focus; point that has a special relationship with an ellipse, hyperbola or parabola. For example, the sum of the distances between either focal point of an ellipse and any point on the ellipse is constant.

definition_cn: 平行光线经透镜折射或曲面镜反射后的会聚点。
definition_en: focal point; focus; point at which parallel rays of light converge after being refracted through a lens or reflected from a concave mirror

definition_cn: 物质从液态(溶液或熔化状态)或气态形成晶体。
definition_en: crystallize; (of substances) become crystal from a liquid or gaseous state

definition_cn: 为了研究人体或动植物体各器官的组织构造,用特制的刀、剪把人体或动植物体剖开。
definition_en: dissect; cut open the body of a human being, animal or plant with special knives and scissors to study the tissue structure of organs inside

definition_cn: 物体的结构分解。
definition_en: (of an object) disintegrate

definition_cn: 土地的界限。
definition_en: boundary

definition_cn: 用牙齿磨碎食物。
definition_en: masticate; chew; crush, grind or gnaw with teeth

definition_cn: 〈旧时old〉指以租佃为生的人家。
definition_en: tenant; farmer who makes a living by tilling the land for a landlord

definition_cn: 〈旧时old〉指外地迁来的住户。
definition_en: non-native resident; immigrant

definition_cn: 管乐器,上细下粗,最下端的口部向四周张开,可以扩大声音。
definition_en: trumpet; wind instrument fashioned out of a curved brass tube with a narrow mouthpiece and an outspread wide end for amplifying the sound

definition_cn: 认识和处理问题时所处的地位和所抱的态度。
definition_en: position; stand; standpoint

definition_cn: 几何体。
definition_en: solid

definition_cn: 迷信的人认为附在人的躯体上作为主宰的一种非物质的东西,灵魂离开躯体后人即死亡。
definition_en: soul; immaterial spiritual entity believed by the superstitious to be coexistent with the physical body of a person and a dominant spiritual force, which leaves upon the person's death

definition_cn: 原指无业游民,后来指不务正业、为非作歹的人。
definition_en: rogue; hooligan; hoodlum; ruffian; rascal; originally referring to a jobless riff-raff, later to a ne'er-do-well evil-doer

definition_cn: 逻辑学指引用论据来证明论题的真实性的论述过程,是由论据推出论题时所使用的推理形式。
definition_en: (of logic) process of deduction that proves the truth of a proposition on the basis of evidence

definition_cn: 神经系统的病变引起的身体某一部分知觉能力的丧失和运动机能的障碍。
definition_en: paralysis; loss or impairment of sensation or function in certain part of the human body, caused by disease of the nerves

definition_cn: 在江河沿岸及港湾内,供停船时装卸货物和乘客上下的建筑。
definition_en: wharf; dock; quay; pier; facility built parallel to the shoreline for loading and unloading freight and passengers

definition_cn: 信仰神仙鬼怪等。
definition_en: superstition; superstitious belief; belief in deities, immortals, ghosts, etc.

definition_cn: 脸的形状;相貌。
definition_en: face; facial features; appearance

definition_cn: 洗澡。
definition_en: have (or take) a bath

definition_cn: 一个概念所反映的事物的本质属性的总和,也就是概念的内容。例如‘人’这个概念的内涵是能制造工具并使用工具进行劳动的动物。
definition_en: intension; connotation; sum total of the essential properties of matter as reflected by a definition; content of a definition. For example, the connotation of the concept of ‘man’ is ‘the animal that can make and use tools to engage in physical labour’.

definition_cn: 臀部。
definition_en: buttocks (of humans); bottom; behind; backside

definition_cn: 两个平面或一个平面内的两条直线或一条直线与一个平面始终不能相交,叫做平行。
definition_en: parallel; two straight lines on two planes, or on the same plane, or a straight line and a plane, that are equidistant and hence will never cross each other

definition_cn: 大气的状态和现象,例如刮风、闪电、打雷、结霜、下雪等。
definition_en: meteorological phenomena, such as wind, lightning, thunder, frost, snow, etc.

definition_cn: 架在水面上或空中以便行人、车辆等通行的建筑物。
definition_en: bridge; structure built across water or in the air to provide passage for pedestrians, vehicles, etc.

definition_cn: 在河湖或水库等的周围开挖的水道,用来引水排灌。
definition_en: ditch (dug near a river, lake or reservoir for the purpose of irrigation); channel; trench

definition_cn: 人的性格、气质、能力等特征的总和。
definition_en: integration of a person's personality, temperament and ability, etc.

definition_cn: 三角学的简称。
definition_en: Abbr. for三角学sānjiǎoxué

definition_cn: 用闸等止住车的行进。
definition_en: stop a vehicle by applying the brakes; put on the brakes

definition_cn: 停止动力来源,使机器停止运转。
definition_en: stop a machine by cutting off the power; turn off a machine

definition_cn: 利用筛子进行选种、选矿等。
definition_en: use a sieve to select seeds, dress ore, etc.

definition_cn: 河流接近发源地的部分。
definition_en: upper reaches (of a river)

definition_cn: 两种气体或两种可以互相混合的液体,彼此通过多孔性的薄膜而混合。
definition_en: osmosis; two gases or two liquids that can be mixed with each other pass through a porous membrane and mix together

definition_cn: 师范学校的简称。
definition_en: Abbr. for师范学校shīfàn xuéxiào

definition_cn: 用眼睛看东西时,眼睛和物体之间的假想直线。
definition_en: line of vision; view; line of sight (in surveying)

definition_cn: 利用水力资源和防止水的灾害。
definition_en: water conservancy; prevent floods by taking advantage of hydraulic resources

definition_cn: 在表象、概念的基础上进行分析、综合、判断、推理等认识活动的过程。思维是人类特有的一种精神活动,是从社会实践中产生的。
definition_en: thought; thinking; process of mental activity such as analysis, synthesis, judgement and reasoning, based on ideas and concepts, a mental faculty unique to humankind, and a product of social practice.

definition_cn: 素的饭食和点心。
definition_en: vegetarian food; vegetarian diet

definition_cn: 指事物本来的性质。
definition_en: nature; essential character of sth.

definition_cn: 物体受外力作用变形后,除去作用力时能恢复原来形状的性质。
definition_en: elasticity; (of an object) the property of returning to its initial form or state after being deformed by an external force

definition_cn: 为共同的理想、事业而奋斗的人,特指同一个政党的成员。
definition_en: comrade; persons who strive for the common ideal or cause, esp. members of the same party

definition_cn: 指对某一现象有关的数据的搜集、整理、计算和分析等。
definition_en: statistics, census; collection, organization, calculation, analysis, etc., of the relevant data of a phenomenon

definition_cn: 用武力打垮旧的政权,使局面彻底改变。
definition_en: overthrow; overturn; topple; smash an old regime by force in order to bring about a complete change

definition_cn: 网状的东西。
definition_en: network

definition_cn: 强大的使人畏惧的力量。
definition_en: power; force; awe-inspiring, powerful strength

definition_cn: 按一定轨道绕行星运行的天体,本身不能发光。
definition_en: satellite; moon; celestial body that moves around a planet along a given orbit and does not emit light by itself

definition_cn: 为祭祀宰杀的牲畜。
definition_en: sacrifice; beast slaughtered for sacrifice

definition_cn: 儿子的妻子。
definition_en: son's wife; daughter-in-law;

definition_cn: 带路。
definition_en: show sb. the way; act as a guide

definition_cn: 指春天艳丽的景物。
definition_en: lovely spring scene

definition_cn: 对敌采取警戒、牵制、压制等手段,保障部队或人员行动的安全。
definition_en: screen; shield; cover; protect the safety of one's army or personnel by guarding against or containing an enemy

definition_cn: 不文明;没有开化。
definition_en: uncivilized; savage

definition_cn: 死者留下的财产,包括财物、债权等。
definition_en: legacy; inheritance; heritage; property left behind after one's death, including property, creditor's rights, etc.

definition_cn: 人的头脑对于客观物质世界的反映,是感觉、思维等各种心理过程的总和,其中的思维是人类特有的反映现实的高级形式。存在决定意识,意识又反作用于存在。
definition_en: consciousness; awareness. The reflection of the objective material world in man's mind is the sum total of sensation, thinking and other psychological processes, and thinking is a high form of reflection of reality peculiar to man. Being determines consciousness, and consciousness reacts on being.

definition_cn: 大脑皮层的两种基本神经活动过程之一。是在外部或内部刺激下产生的,作用是阻止皮层的兴奋,减弱器官机能的活动。睡眠就是大脑皮层全部处于抑制的现象。
definition_en: inhibition; one of the two basic processes of nervous activity of the cerebral cortex, caused by external or internal stimulation, its function being to check the excitation of the cortex and reduce the activities of the organs. Sleep is exactly a complete inhibition of the cerebral cortex.

definition_cn: 泛指油类和漆类涂料。
definition_en: paint

definition_cn: 年纪小。
definition_en: young

definition_cn: 使用手段,使人认识模糊而做坏事。
definition_en: entice; tempt; seduce; lure

definition_cn: 君主。
definition_en: monarch

definition_cn: 敌对双方所进行的武装冲突,是达到战争目的的主要手段。
definition_en: fight; battle; combat; military conflict between antagonistic parties, the main means to achieve the objectives of a war

definition_cn: 指导战争全局的计划和策略。
definition_en: strategy; overall plan and tactics for a war

definition_cn: 用武装力量取得(阵地或领土)。
definition_en: capture; occupy; seize; use force to seize (a position or territory)

definition_cn: 占据。
definition_en: own; possess; have

definition_cn: 作战队伍的外貌。
definition_en: battle array (or formation)

definition_cn: 付出去;支付。
definition_en: pay (money); expend; disburse

definition_cn: 起支撑作用的柱子。
definition_en: pillar; prop

definition_cn: 反映客观事物的整体形象和表面联系的心理过程。知觉是在感觉的基础上形成的,比感觉复杂、完整。
definition_en: perception; psychological process that reflects the overall image of sth. objective and its superficial relationships. Perception is formed on the basis of sensations but is more complex and complete.

definition_cn: 物体内各点所受的重力产生合力,这个合力的作用点叫做这个物体的重心。
definition_en: barycentre; centre of mass; centre of gravity; centroid; point in a body at which the mass of various points within the same body may be considered to be concentrated and at which external forces may be considered to be applied

definition_cn: 三角形三条中线相交于一点,这个点叫做三角形的重心。
definition_en: median point; intersection of the three medians of a triangle

definition_cn: 企业的资金从投入生产到销售产品而收回货币,再投入生产,这个过程一次又一次地重复进行,叫做周转。周转所需的时间,是生产时间和流通时间的总和。
definition_en: turnover; repeated business process, from investment, production and sales to the return of the invested capital; the time taken for a turnover is the sum of productive time plus circulating time

definition_cn: 干流。
definition_en: trunk stream; mainstream

definition_cn: 文学、艺术作品中所表现的中心思想,是作品思想内容的核心。
definition_en: theme (of a literary or art work); subject; motif; leitmotiv

definition_cn: 用来生产或经营以求牟利的生产资料和货币。
definition_en: capital; materials and money used in production or management to pursue profit

definition_cn: 屋檐下高出平地的走道,或房屋之间有顶的走道。
definition_en: corridor; passage; passageway; raised walkway under the eaves of a house; roofed walkway between two buildings

definition_cn: (工作或学习的态度)切实;不浮躁。
definition_en: (of attitude towards work or study) down-to-earth; steadfast

definition_cn: 柱形物体的横剖面向一端逐渐缩小的形式。
definition_en: coning; tapering; gradual decrease in breadth or thickness of one end of an elongated object;

definition_cn: 木芙蓉。
definition_en: cottonrose hibiscus (Hibiscus mutabilis)

definition_cn: 木偶戏里的木头人。
definition_en: puppet; marionette; wooden figure in puppet show

definition_cn: 常绿小乔木或灌木,叶子椭圆形,花小,白色或暗黄色,有特殊的香气,结核果,卵圆形。花供观赏,又可做香料。
definition_en: sweet-scented osmanthus (Osmanthus fragrans); evergreen tree or shrub with oblong leaves, small, white or yellowish flowers, a special sweet scent, ovate drupels, and flowers that are used for ornament or making perfumes and spices;

definition_cn: 这种植物的花。
definition_en: flower of the plant;

definition_cn: 车轮子。
definition_en: wheel

definition_cn: 心理学上指在知觉材料的基础上,经过新的配合而创造出新形象的心理过程。
definition_en: imagination; psychological process of creating mental images through the recombination of available perceived material

definition_cn: 徘徊(huái)。
definition_en: pace up and down

definition_cn: 记录语言的符号,如汉字、拉丁字母等。
definition_en: characters; script; writing; symbols for recording what is spoken, as Chinese characters, Latin letters, etc.

definition_cn: 语言的书面形式,如汉文、英文等。
definition_en: written form of a language, as the Chinese language, English language, etc.

definition_cn: 垫在房屋柱子底下的石头。
definition_en: stone base on which the columns of a house stand

definition_cn: 豆类作物。
definition_en: pod-bearing plant; legume; pulse; pea; bean

definition_cn: 工资以外的补助费,也指供给制人员的生活零用钱。
definition_en: subsidy; allowance, in addition to salary

definition_cn: 鸟类身体表面所长的毛,有保护身体、保持体温、帮助飞翔等作用。
definition_en: feather; plume; covering growth on the body of a bird, which protects the body, keeps the temperature and helps it fly

definition_cn: same as坝
definition_en: bà

definition_cn: 物品提出精华后剩下的东西。
definition_en: dregs; sediment; residue; leftover after the essence has been abstracted

definition_cn: 国画的一种画法,用水墨或淡的色彩涂抹画面,以加强艺术效果。
definition_en: Chinese painting style, where washes of ink or pale colours are added to a Chinese painting to heighten artistic effect; ratchet up

definition_cn: 在木板或金属板上刻字或图(或用化学方法腐蚀而成),使成为印刷用的底版。
definition_en: engrave, or use chemical erosion to prepare, blocks for printing; carve printing blocks;

definition_cn: 烽火;战火。
definition_en: signal fire; flames of war

definition_cn: (姿态)美好,多用来形容女子。
definition_en: (oft. of women) lovely; graceful; beautiful

definition_cn: 庄稼收成不好或没有收成。
definition_en: crop failure
